homepage.title: AI-Powered Interview Research
homepage.subtitle: Conduct professional interviews with real people and AI Personas. Generate insights automatically with our intelligent interviewer.
homepage.humanInterviewsDescription: Share secure links to invite real participants and conduct structured interviews
homepage.aiInterviewsDescription: Interview diverse AI Personas to explore different perspectives and gather insights
homepage.analyticsDescription: Automatically generate comprehensive reports and extract key insights from conversations
homepage.howItWorksSubtitle: Simple steps to conduct professional research interviews
homepage.step1Description: Define your research brief and interview objectives
homepage.step2Description: Invite humans or select AI Personas for interviews
homepage.step3Description: Our AI interviewer conducts professional conversations
homepage.step4Description: Get detailed analysis and insights automatically
homepage.ctaDescription: Create your first interview project and begin gathering valuable insights today.

createProjectDialog.briefPlaceholder: Describe your research objectives and target audience...

projectsList.title: Interview Projects
projectsList.description: Manage your interview projects and collect valuable insights
projectsList.createFirstProject: Create interview to start collecting insights
projectsList.upgradeToMaxPlan: Please upgrade to MAX plan to use this feature

projectDetails.title: Interview Project
projectDetails.privacyDescription: This conversation was recorded for research purposes. Privacy is protected according to our data policy.
projectDetails.shareDescription: Generate a shareable link for others to participate in interviews for this project.
projectDetails.permanentLinkWarning: Anyone with this link will always have access to this interview project, even after you generate new temporary links.
projectDetails.disablePermanentLinkWarning: This will immediately disable all existing permanent links that have been shared. Anyone with those links will no longer be able to access this interview project. If you enable permanent links again, a new link will be generated.
projectDetails.noInterviewsDescription: Share the project link or interview an AI Persona to get started
projectDetails.questionListDescription: Manage your interview questions, configure images and types for each question

ShareInterviewProjectButton.title: Share Interview Project
ShareInterviewProjectButton.shareTipMessage: Use this link to access the project or copy it to share with others:
ShareInterviewProjectButton.openInstructions: You can also click "Open" below to view it in a new tab.

sessionViewer.restartChatDescription: This will clear all existing messages and restart the interview from the beginning.
sessionViewer.autoConversationNote: The AI Persona conversation will automatically begin again.

shareInvite.title: You're Invited to an Interview
shareInvite.subtitle: has invited you to participate in a research interview
shareInvite.description: This interview will help gather insights for research purposes
shareInvite.privacyDescription: Your responses will be used for research purposes only. Personal information will be kept confidential and secure.
shareInvite.loginDescription: Please log in to participate in this interview
shareInvite.languageDescription: Choose your preferred language for the interview
shareInvite.welcomeSubtitleLine1: Welcome! You'll be shown some advertisements and asked for your detailed feedback.
shareInvite.welcomeSubtitleLine2: Please be specific and honest in your responses - there are no right or wrong answers.
shareInvite.privacyAgreementLabel: I agree to the privacy policy and consent to participate in this research
shareInvite.privacyCheckboxRequired: You must agree to the privacy policy to continue

sessionChat.thankYou: Thank you for participating in this interview session. Your responses have been recorded and will be used for research purposes.
sessionChat.summaryAnalysis: The interview summary and analysis will be available to the researcher shortly.

reports.title: Reports
reports.description: Generated analysis reports from interview sessions
reports.noReportsDescription: Generate your first report to analyze interview insights
reports.generatingReportDescription: Your report is being generated. You can close this dialog and check back later by refreshing the reports list.
reports.refreshTip: 💡 Tip: Use the refresh button to check if your report is ready
reports.selectDataSourceDescription: Choose which interviews to include in the report
reports.allInterviewsDescription: Include both human and AI Persona interviews
reports.humanInterviewsOnlyDescription: Include only real human participant interviews

InterviewReportShareButton.title: Report URL
InterviewReportShareButton.successMessage: Interview report URL is ready. You can access the report at this address or share it with others:
InterviewReportShareButton.openInstructions: You can also click the "Open" button below to view in a new tab.

requestInteractionForm.basicInfoPrologue: Please fill in the following basic information to help us conduct the interview better
requestInteractionForm.requiredFieldsError: Please fill in all required fields
requestInteractionForm.submitError: Failed to submit, please try again
requestInteractionForm.selectAtLeastOne: Please select at least one option

transcriptDisplay.generatedNote: This transcript was automatically generated on

languageSwitcher.title: Change Language
languageSwitcher.description: Switching language will regenerate the form, and your current input will be cleared. Do you want to continue?

editQuestion.title: Edit Question
editQuestion.description: Modify question content, upload images, and set question type
editQuestion.createDescription: Enter question content, upload images, and set question type
editQuestion.supportedFormats: Supports JPG, PNG, WebP, GIF, max 10MB
editQuestion.atLeastTwoOptions: Choice questions must have at least 2 options
editQuestion.atMost50Options: Choice questions can have at most 50 options
editQuestion.invalidImageType: Unsupported image format. Please upload JPG, PNG, WebP or GIF
editQuestion.imageUploadFailed: Failed to upload image, please try again
editQuestion.hintPlaceholder: e.g., Show input field when 'Other' is selected; End interview when 'Not interested' is selected
editQuestion.hintDescription: Describe special behaviors for AI in natural language, such as showing input fields, skipping questions, or ending interviews

createProject.title: Create Interview Project
createProject.projectBriefDescription: Describe your research objectives and target audience
createProject.projectBriefPlaceholder: Example: We are researching user feedback on new product features, aiming to understand their experience and suggestions for improvement...
createProject.presetQuestionsDescription: Enter your interview questions, one per line. Leave empty to auto-generate questions based on your brief.
createProject.presetQuestionsPlaceholder:
What's your first impression of this product?
Would you recommend this product to a friend? Why?
If you could improve one feature, which would you choose?

(Optional: Leave empty to auto-generate questions)
createProject.presetQuestionsHint: After creating the project, you can add images and set question types for each question in the project details page

interviewComplete.title: Interview Completed
interviewComplete.subtitle: Thank You for Participating
interviewComplete.thankYouMessage: Thank you very much for taking the time to participate in this interview. Your responses are invaluable to our research.
interviewComplete.processingMessage: We are processing your interview transcript...
